FEATURES LIST - Face Recognition Attendance System
=================================================

1. USER ROLES
   - Admin: Full system access, can manage students, teachers, and all attendance
   - Teacher: Department-specific access, can mark attendance and view department students
   - Student: Can view their own attendance records

2. STUDENT MANAGEMENT
   - Add new students with details:
     * Student ID (auto-generated)
     * Full Name
     * Roll Number
     * Department
     * Year
     * Email (optional)
     * Phone (optional)
   - Login Credentials (optional):
     * Username
     * Password
   - Delete students
   - Register/Update face recognition for students

3. TEACHER MANAGEMENT
   - Add teachers with:
     * Username
     * Password
     * Name
     * Assigned Department
   - Update teacher details
   - Delete teachers

4. FACE RECOGNITION
   - Capture face during student registration (optional)
   - Register face later using camera button
   - Mark attendance by face recognition
   - Real-time face detection with guide overlay
   - Duplicate face detection to prevent fraud

5. ATTENDANCE MARKING
   - Automatic face-based attendance marking
   - Manual attendance marking by teachers/admin
   - Mark attendance for any date (past or present)
   - Mark as Present/Absent

6. ATTENDANCE REPORTS
   - View all attendance records
   - Filter by date
   - Filter by department
   - Filter by status (Present/Absent)
   - Export to Excel (.xlsx format)

7. DASHBOARD & STATISTICS
   - Overall attendance statistics
   - Today's attendance summary
   - Attendance trend chart (last 7 days)
   - Department-wise statistics
   - Student-wise attendance stats

8. STUDENT PORTAL
   - Students can view their own attendance
   - View attendance statistics (total days, present days, percentage)
   - Check if marked present for today

9. SECURITY FEATURES
   - Password hashing (SHA256)
   - Session management
   - Role-based access control
   - Login required for all protected routes

10. LOGIN METHODS
    - Username/Password login
   

DEFAULT ACCOUNTS
===============
- Admin: username='admin', password='admin123'
- Teacher: username='teacher', password='teacher123' (Computer Application dept)
- Student: username='student', password='student123'

TECHNOLOGY STACK
================
- Backend: Python Flask
- Database: MySQL
- Face Recognition: face_recognition library (dlib)
- Frontend: HTML, CSS, Bootstrap 5, JavaScript
- DataTables: For interactive tables
- Excel Export: openpyxl

All features are accessible via http://localhost:5000
